title: BALLOON WEIGHT foil:black
features: Black balloon weight with a pretty fringed foil finish.
Easily secure helium balloons to a balloon weight or weighted centrepiece to stop your bouquet from floating away.
Simply secure the balloons using balloon or curling ribbon. (Sold separately)
This weight weighs: 170g and can hold up to 10x latex or 12x foil balloons.
description: From the manufacturer About us Amscan truly is party supplier with over 12,000 products, conveniently divided into three core areas: Balloons, Dress-Up and Everyday Party. Within these areas you'll then find a host of seasonal and special event products; from Halloween to Christmas, we can provide wholesale fun to cover every conceivable event. Working closely with you, we have the expertise and manufacturing flexibility to design and provide bespoke products Our ever growing range of party products can be mixed, matched and combined to suit any occasion, or pick from any of our carefully co-ordinated themes. Our designs combine quality, fun and imagination; more than enough to outfit with a year round selection of themed costumes and accessories, suitable for all ages and interests.
